summary: Well-structured test suite with strong coverage of core functionality. Unit tests for each module are clear and focused. Integration tests (CLI and workflow) use real files and subprocess spawning appropriately. Strengths: good organization, clear test names, effective use of fixtures and isolation, comprehensive happy-path testing. Weaknesses: missing edge case testing (e.g., very long names, special characters, malformed config), no tests for config file not found or invalid policy JSON, limited boundary condition testing, no failure scenario testing in workflow act tests. Would catch most regressions in core logic but may miss error handling edge cases.
